title: IIM Lucknow Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Counsellor Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Lucknow Counsellor Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class along with 3 years' relevant experience OR M.A./M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class along with 5 years' relevant experience.
qualification.details: PhD or M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class along with 3 years' relevant experience. OR M.A./M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class along with 5 years' relevant experience. Relevant experience is defined as counselling experience for group counselling as well as individual counselling in an educational institution or mental health care clinical/hospital/institution.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Counsellor post at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Counsellor position at IIM Lucknow is 31st May 2026. Ensure you submit your application well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counsellor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD or M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class and 3 years of experience, or an M.A./M.Sc. in Clinical Psychology with 1st Class and 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Counsellor post is 50 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Counsellor position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 102,620 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Counsellor at the Indian Institute of Management Lucknow.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Counsellor post at IIM Lucknow is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counsellor post at IIM Lucknow will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contractual position at the Indian Institute of Management Lucknow.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.
